topic: A close-up of a Newton's Cradle in motion on a desk, macro view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Front view: A single ball is drawn back and released, starting a gentle, rhythmic swing.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Close-up: The collision and momentum transfer are seen in sharp macro detail as beads align.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Top-down: The array settles into a mirrored rebound, all balls swinging in unison from above.
parsed_generation.narration: A single ball is pulled and released, initiating momentum transfer across the cradle. The close-up captures the collision and transfer, then the top-down reveals the synchronized rebound completing the rhythm.

Strengthen the macro focus from the opening frame and anchor the scene to a desk surface. Enhance lighting and metallic textures to better convey the cradle's material and motion cues.
